steps.voice: The Display card — brightness control and dimmer binding.
Brightness slider, 5 to 100 percent. Drives the backlight on device; dims the canvas here in the sandbox.
Dimmer Switch Config — bind brightness to a CAN signal like your headlights.
Pick a signal, set a threshold, and the dash drops to your chosen dim level automatically.
Brightness setting persists in NVS — survives power cycles.
